hdd4be71fge9bbg45c2gbda9gccd07c21a037: Listen closely: There will be ghaik ahead. If they speak, do as they say. We must not reveal our minds are our own.
ha68c1811g71c3g49f1g8031g7aced18f4634: Listen closely istik: There will be ghaik - mind flayers - ahead. If they speak, do as they say. We must not reveal our minds are our own.
h7f3e81a4g7799g49a4g9d3bgd79b053fcdcb: As you wish: I will follow their commands.
h30037d76g7b11g4105g8e1dg949eba5ca17a: I would expect so. It is the one path to our purification.
h9a207fb7geed4g41e4gbf73g06445a56a66e: I take orders from no one. Not mind flayers, and not you.
h2ce18a7bg11b2g4e51ga73agaeac865e8fc5: Is your ego so thin you would submit to slaughter by ghaik hands? Such is your fate if you refuse them.
